project_metadata.name: Personal Portfolio
project_metadata.core_concept: Diagonal split screen (Dark/Light) with vibrant floating 3D elements.

buttons.hover_effect: Slight scale up, subtle glow matching accent colors

social_icons.style: Circular background, flat monochrome icon inside

navigation.style: Sticky, transparent, adapting text color based on background (mix-blend-mode or explicit styling)

general_rules.flow: Alternate between full-width dark sections and full-width light sections with the isometric grid to maintain the duality established in the hero.

hero.layout: Diagonal split background. Centered typography. Floating 3D shapes overflowing the background split. Vertical scroll indicator line at the bottom.

biography.layout: Two-column. Left: Clean typography with a bright blue accent heading. Right: Floating 3D element or a stylized photo of the developer.

projects.layout: CSS Grid (2 or 3 columns). Project cards with solid white background, soft drop shadow, dark text, and vibrant gradient borders on hover.

skills.layout: Flexbox layout. Skills represented as pill-shaped tags or minimalist progress bars using the bright gradient palette.

contacts.layout: Centered minimalist form. Large typography for 'Let's work together'. Submit button in primary blue (#2563EB).
